description: A salon and beauty booking marketplace MVP with Apple-style UI/UX. Clients can browse salons without login, search by location or map, view business details, book appointments with service and time-slot selection, and manage upcoming bookings and favorites. Built as an Nx monorepo with an Expo React Native mobile app and a NestJS + Prisma + PostgreSQL API. Admin dashboard, payments, and background job processing are planned but not yet implemented.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: JWT access/refresh token auth with register, login, logout, and role-based guards (client, provider, admin). Mobile auth screens for login, register, and verification.

features.name: Guest Browse & Explore
features.description: Default route opens Explore tab without requiring authentication; users can browse salons as guests.

features.name: Business Search & Discovery
features.description: Text search, address suggestions, filter pills (distance, rating, price, availability), and search results listing with business cards.

features.name: Map-based Search
features.description: Map search screen with viewport-based geo queries, PostGIS backend support, and map bottom card UI.

features.name: Business Detail View
features.description: Salon detail screen with image carousel, tabs, services, staff selection, reviews section, and about info.

features.name: Service Categories
features.description: API module and mobile query hooks for fetching service categories used in search and filtering.

features.name: Booking Flow
features.description: Multi-step booking: service selection, date picker, time slots grid, identification/registration, and success confirmation. Backed by appointments and availability APIs with overlap exclusion.

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: List upcoming bookings and view appointment details; cancel appointments via API.

features.name: Favorites
features.description: Save and list favorite businesses with API persistence and mobile FavoritesContext.

features.name: User Profile
features.description: Profile screen and bottom navigation entry; basic account surface on mobile.

features.name: Availability & Slot Computation
features.description: Backend availability service with configurable slot steps, Redis caching, and appointment overlap constraints.

features.name: Shared Types & Design System
features.description: packages/shared for enums, pagination, booking utils; packages/ui for tokens and base components; editorial theme on mobile.

features.name: Reviews & Ratings
features.description: SalonReviews UI component exists on mobile; review stats migration present but full review submission/moderation flow appears incomplete.

features.name: Payment Integration
features.description: PaymentProvider and PaymentStatus enums defined in shared types; no Stripe or checkout implementation found.

features.name: Notifications
features.description: NotificationChannel enum defined; no email or push notification delivery implementation found.

features.name: Provider / Business Owner Portal
features.description: Provider roles exist in auth model but no dedicated owner dashboard or staff management UI.

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Planned Next.js admin app mentioned in README; not present in codebase.

features.name: Background Jobs (BullMQ)
features.description: Redis module exists for caching; BullMQ job queue mentioned as planned but not implemented.

missing_parts: Stripe or offline payment checkout flow
Full reviews CRUD and moderation backend
Production deployment and infra automation beyond basic CI
